backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing the portfolio backend with admin-gated endpoints for managing artworks, images (logo, cover, portrait), user profiles, and text content, using access control and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades actor state by adding a default `textContent` field (artistName, tagline, bio) to the existing state shape.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features (admin logo-click login flow, AdminPanel editing capabilities, Instagram link fix) to their relevant source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH CSS custom property color tokens for light and dark themes including sidebar and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite app, setting the page title to 'Khudrang Kalakaar Portfolio' and mounting the React app at `#root`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app that sets up TanStack Router with two routes (`/` for the portfolio page and `/admin` for AdminPanel), wrapped in a shared QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Static about section displaying the artist portrait image, bio text, decorative corner accents, a floating experience badge, and a stats row with years, projects, and satisfaction metrics.
frontend/src/components/ArtworkGallery.t: Responsive gallery section that fetches artworks from the backend, renders them in a 4-column grid with hover effects, and opens a lightbox dialog on click; hidden when no artworks exist.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Renders a contact section with location, Instagram, and WhatsApp cards, plus CTA buttons linking to the artist's WhatsApp and Instagram profiles.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProjects: Defines a list of five featured mural projects and renders them using the ProjectSection component with alternating layouts.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with branding, copyright info, and a logo button that triggers Internet Identity login and redirects admins to the admin page.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section displaying the artist's name, tagline, and CTA buttons over a dynamic cover image fetched from the backend or a fallback asset.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, active section highlighting via scroll spy, a logo that triggers admin login, and a responsive mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/ProjectSection.t: Reusable article component that displays a single project with a large image (70%) and a text panel (30%), supporting optional location and alternating layout direction.
Displays a grid of seven service offerings, each with an icon, title, and short description, styled with hover animations.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Renders a 'Why Clients Trust Us' section displaying six trust points (experience, design, quality, etc.) in a responsive grid with icons and numbered accents.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including fetching and mutating logo, cover image, artist portrait, text content, and artworks via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollSpy.ts: Custom hook that tracks which section is currently in view by comparing scroll position against section element offsets, returning the active section ID.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Poppins font, configures Tailwind CSS with custom CSS variables for a terracotta-accented color theme, and defines utility classes for section layout and headings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page allowing authenticated admins to upload images (logo, cover, portrait) and manage artworks and text content, with progress indicators, tabbed layout, and CRUD operations via React Query mutations.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens (colors using oklch, fonts, border radius, shadows, keyframes) and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for 'Khudrang Kalakaar' tracking existing features (admin panel access via logo, full admin editing, Instagram link fix) and pending new feature requests at schema version 3.
